Container.Name: Hindsight
Container.Overview:
Hindsight is a self-hosted agent memory system that gives LLM agents persistent, queryable memory with knowledge graph, entity resolution, and multi-strategy semantic retrieval. State-of-the-art on the LongMemEval benchmark.
**Defaults to embedded PostgreSQL (pg0)** — runs out of the box, no extra services needed. To use external PostgreSQL with pgvector, set HINDSIGHT_API_DATABASE_URL.
**Permissions are handled automatically** — this template starts as root, fixes ownership of bind-mounted dirs, then drops privileges to the application user. No manual `chown` required.
**You will need an LLM API key** — OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek, MiniMax, or a self-hosted endpoint via Ollama / LM Studio. See https://hindsight.vectorize.io/developer/models for supported providers.
**Endpoints**: • Web UI: http://[your-ip]:9999 • REST API + MCP: http://[your-ip]:8888
**First-run cost**: ~220 MB of HuggingFace model weights download into the cache path on initial start (BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 + cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2). Subsequent restarts are instant thanks to the persistent cache mount.
Container.PostArgs: sh -c 'chown -R hindsight:hindsight /home/hindsight/.cache /home/hindsight/.pg0 2>/dev/null || true; exec runuser -u hindsight -- /app/start-all.sh'
Container.Description: Self-hosted agent memory with knowledge graph, entity resolution, and multi-strategy retrieval. Open source (MIT). Defaults to embedded Postgres for zero-config startup; supports external pgvector for production. Permission auto-fix means first install just works — no shell command required.
Container.Changes: ### v0.5.6 (initial template release) - Wraps `ghcr.io/vectorize-io/hindsight:latest` (upstream v0.5.6) - Embedded pg0 by default; external pg via HINDSIGHT_API_DATABASE_URL - Persistent HuggingFace model cache - Auto-chown wrapper so bind paths created by Unraid (default 99:100) are made writable for the application user without manual intervention - Restart policy `unless-stopped` so the container survives host reboots and crashes

Config.Name: Model Cache
Config.Description: HuggingFace embedding + reranker model cache (~220 MB after first start). Persisting this avoids re-download on every container update.

Config.Name: Database (embedded pg0)
Config.Description: Where embedded PostgreSQL stores ALL your memories. Persisting this is critical — wiping this directory loses all stored memories. Ignored if you set External Postgres URL below.

Config.Name: LLM Provider
Config.Description: One of: openai, anthropic, gemini, groq, deepseek, minimax, vertexai, ollama, lmstudio. Hindsight uses your LLM to extract structured facts from incoming content.

Config.Name: LLM API Key
Config.Description: Provider API key. For Ollama / LM Studio you can put any non-empty string.

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: Examples: gpt-4o-mini (OpenAI), claude-haiku-4-5 (Anthropic), gemini-2.5-flash (Gemini), gemma3:12b (Ollama). Cheaper / faster models are fine — fact extraction is a simple task.

Config.Name: LLM Base URL
Config.Description: Override only for self-hosted endpoints. Examples: http://192.168.1.10:11434/v1 (Ollama), http://192.168.1.10:1234/v1 (LM Studio). Leave empty for cloud providers (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/etc).

Config.Name: External Postgres URL
Config.Description: If set, replaces embedded pg0 with an external PostgreSQL instance (must have the pgvector extension installed). Format: postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/dbname. When set, the embedded pg0 path mapping above can be removed.

Config.Name: API Bind Host
Config.Description: Address the API listens on inside the container. Leave at 0.0.0.0 unless you know why you'd change it.

Config.Name: API Bind Port
Config.Description: Port the API listens on inside the container. Should match the container side of the API port mapping above.
